name: config_simmodel
full_help:
config_simmodel

Description: 
Configure settings for simulation models

Syntax: 
config_simmodel  [-name <arg>] [-value <arg>] [-report] [-reset] [-quiet]
                 [-verbose] <simulator>

Usage: 
  Name         Description
  ------------------------
  [-name]      Name of the configuration (<simulator>.compile.<compiler>.<simm
               odel>)
  [-value]     Value of the configuration
  [-report]    Print the list of configuration settings of the specified 
               simulator
  [-reset]     Reset configuration settings of the specified simulator
  [-quiet]     Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]   Suspend message limits during command execution
  <simulator>  Name of the simulator

Categories: 
Simulation

arguments.description: Print the list of configuration settings of the specified simulator
Reset configuration settings of the specified simulator
Suspend message limits during command execution
